name: agentrelay
description: AgentRelay is a PoC for A2A-shaped communication between local Codex-style agents that do not have public IP addresses.

scripts.test:python: python3 -m py_compile server/app.py server/store.py server/protocol_v03.py server/timeline.py server/transitions.py scripts/smoke_test.py scripts/auth_smoke_test.py scripts/generate_agent_token.py scripts/upsert_agent_identity.py scripts/identity_smoke_test.py scripts/sync_agents_from_auth.py scripts/onboard_agent.py scripts/onboarding_smoke_test.py scripts/phase2_store_smoke_test.py scripts/phase2_api_smoke_test.py scripts/protocol_v02_smoke_test.py scripts/protocol_v03_smoke_test.py scripts/protocol_v03_conformance_runner.py scripts/transition_smoke_test.py scripts/reliable_event_smoke_test.py scripts/task_ttl_smoke_test.py scripts/agent_card_smoke_test.py scripts/agentrelay_admin.py scripts/admin_cli_smoke_test.py scripts/admin_dashboard_smoke_test.py scripts/install_healthcheck_smoke_test.py server/ws_app.py scripts/phase2_ws_smoke_test.py
scripts.test: npm run test:python && npm run test:schema && npm run test:auth && npm run test:identity && npm run test:onboarding && npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:phase2:api && npm run test:protocol:v02 && npm run test:protocol:v03 && npm run test:protocol:v03:conformance && npm run test:transitions && npm run test:reliable-events && npm run test:task-ttl && npm run test:agent-card && npm run test:admin-cli && npm run test:admin-dashboard && npm run test:install-healthcheck && npm run test:phase2:ws && npm run test:mcp
